evals.prompt: Search YouTube for videos about NIST RMF compliance automation
evals.expected_output: Formatted list of YouTube search results with metadata (title, channel, subs, views, duration, date, URL, engagement ratio) and dividers between results

evals.prompt: Research what YouTube creators are saying about AI in cybersecurity in 2026
evals.expected_output: Auto-pulled transcripts from top results with a synthesized research summary covering key themes, consensus, disagreements, and notable claims

evals.prompt: Find YouTube videos about FedRAMP cloud authorization --months 12
evals.expected_output: Formatted search results filtered to last 12 months with all metadata fields and engagement ratios
